title: Celsius - REKT
relevance_summary: Large-scale liquidation and withdrawal attempts by Celsius leading to potential flash loan abuse and liquidity crises.
red_flags: large WBTC holdings at risk of liquidation
monitoring_rules: Monitor large-scale liquidation and withdrawal attempts by Celsius for potential flash loan abuse and liquidity crises
summary: Celsius faced a liquidity crisis due to large amounts of staked ETH and WBTC holdings at risk of liquidation. Potential red flags include large-scale liquidation and withdrawal attempts, which could lead to flash loan abuse and further exacerbate the liquidity crisis.
